# catalystcenter_anchor_group (Resource)

This resource manages wireless Anchor Groups. Anchor Groups define mobility anchor WLCs for guest tunneling, supporting up to 3 anchors with configurable priority.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_anchor_group" "example" {
  anchor_group_name = "AG1"
  mobility_anchors = [
    {
      device_name         = "WLC-ANCHOR"
      ip_address          = "10.0.0.1"
      anchor_priority     = "PRIMARY"
      managed_anchor_wlc  = false
      peer_device_type    = "IOS-XE"
      mac_address         = "aa:bb:cc:00:00:01"
      mobility_group_name = "default"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `anchor_group_name` (String) Anchor Group Name. Max length is 32 characters.
- `mobility_anchors` (Attributes List) Mobility Anchor details. Maximum 3 anchors are allowed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mobility_anchors))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

<a id="nestedatt--mobility_anchors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mobility_anchors`

Required:

- `anchor_priority` (String) Anchor priority. Only one priority value is allowed per anchor WLC.
  - Choices: `PRIMARY`, `SECONDARY`, `TERTIARY`
- `device_name` (String) Peer device host name.
- `ip_address` (String) Mobility public IP address of the anchor WLC.
- `managed_anchor_wlc` (Boolean) Whether the anchor WLC is managed by the Network Controller.

Optional:

- `mac_address` (String) Peer device mobility MAC address. Allowed formats: 0a0b.0c01.0211, 0a0b0c010211, 0a:0b:0c:01:02:11. Required for external (unmanaged) anchors.
- `mobility_group_name` (String) Peer device mobility group name. Must be alphanumeric, maximum 31 characters. Required for external (unmanaged) anchors.
- `peer_device_type` (String) Indicates whether the peer device belongs to AireOS or IOS-XE family. Required for external (unmanaged) anchors.
  - Choices: `IOS-XE`, `AIREOS`
- `private_ip` (String) Private management IP address of the anchor WLC.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_anchor_group.example "4b0b7a80-44c0-4bf2-bab5-fc24b4e0a17e"
```
